# PB&J Strategic Accounting

> PB&J Strategic Accounting is a bookkeeping and accounting firm based in Fleming Island, Clay County, Florida. Founded by Brittany Ferguson, the firm specializes in helping small businesses simplify their finances and grow with confidence. PB&J stands for Precision, Balance & Just-in-Time.

## Business Information

- **Owner**: Brittany Ferguson (13+ years accounting experience)
- **Location**: 1845 Town Center Blvd. Suite #205, Fleming Island, FL 32003
- **Phone**: 904-708-2411
- **Email**: info@pbjsa.com
- **Hours**: Monday–Friday, 8:00 am – 5:00 pm
- **Service Area**: Clay County, Jacksonville, Northeast Florida, and remote clients nationwide
- **Website**: https://pbjsa.com

## Services Offered

1. **Bookkeeping** — Accurate, tax-ready bookkeeping including reconciliations, reporting, and day-to-day financial management.
2. **QuickBooks Clean-Up** — Organizing past records, fixing errors, removing duplicates, and restoring accurate books.
3. **Fractional CFO Services** — High-level financial expertise (cash flow, budgeting, growth planning) without a full-time hire.
4. **Cash Flow Management** — Tracking and improving cash flow for liquidity, expense coverage, and growth.
5. **Budgeting & Forecasting** — Building realistic budgets and forecasts for smarter business decisions.
6. **Financial Reporting** — Clear, easy-to-understand financial reports for informed decision-making.
7. **Financial Planning** — Tailored planning to manage cash flow, reduce risk, and align with long-term goals.

## Pricing Plans

| Plan | Starting Price | Best For |
|------|---------------|----------|
| The Crustless | $400/month | Businesses with in-house bookkeeper needing oversight |
| Just the Crust | $500/month | Basic bookkeeping essentials |
| The Classic | $1,000/month | Full bookkeeping + payroll (Most Popular) |
| The Jelly Royale | $1,500/month | AR/AP, forecasting, weekly transactions |
| The Ultimate Spread | $2,000/month | Full-service including CFO support and KPIs |
| The Nutty Buddy | $125/hour | Flexible hourly support |
| The Rescue Spread | From $800 | One-time catch-up bookkeeping or QuickBooks cleanup |
